stemHtml: For a multi-engined piston aeroplane, the climb gradient from 50 ft above the take-off reference point to the cloud base is assumed to be the (1) _____ multiplied by a factor of 0.77. After entering the cloud base and no longer in VMC, the climb gradient is assumed to be the (2) _____.

options.a: (1) all-engine climb gradient; (2) all-engine climb gradient
options.b: (1) OEI climb gradient; (2) all-engine climb gradient
options.c: (1) OEI climb gradient; (2) OEI climb gradient
options.d: (1) all-engine climb gradient; (2) OEI climb gradient
